details.IncidentDetail: "[9] 87-9 AVD 1185 EASIEST ACCESS IS FROM PNR SIDE "
"[3] VEH CRASHED INTO 805/ SWEETWATER PNR"
"[1] METAL DEBRIS MOSTLY IN EB LNS "
"[1] ^SIGNALS ON FLASH FOR CONST TIL 1500"
"[1] ^SIGNALS ON FLASH FOR CONST TIL 0800"
"[62] 1039 RO - RO CPZ ALL INFO "
"[57] [Notification] [CHP]-RO CALLING IN AGAIN INQ IF THEY CAN AT LEAST GO RETRIEVE THEIR PERSONAL BELONGING INSIDE VEH //RDWY ADVS RP THEY WOULDN'T ALLOW IT UNTIL MONDAY"
"[56] 92-61 VEH IS STILL HALF A MILE DOWN THE EMBANKMENT - 1039 RO FOR LINE 55 / RO WAS GIVEN ROADWAY TOW #"
"[55] 92-61 VEH TOTALED / ROADWAY WILL BE TAKING THE VEH / NEG ON HIM GOING ON SCENE / WILL HAVE TO GO TO ROADWAY TO PICK UP VEH"
"[54] [Notification] [CHP]-RO OF BMW RELEASED FROM HOSP AND INQ 1020 OF VEH "
"[49] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt to 1181-Trfc Collision-Minor Inj by CHP"
"[48] 92-28C -SOLO VEH 1181 / SUBJ WAS 849B TO HOSPITAL"
"[42] [Notification] [CHP]-BT ETA 20 MIN "
"[37] 28C VEH WILL REMAIN ON SCENE - KEEP ROADWAY ATTACHED TO CALL - THEY WILL BE BACK IN THE MORNING WHEN THERE IS MORE LIGHT TO RECOVER VEH "
"[33] 92-28C - VEH WILL BE 200 FT DOWN EMBANKMENT - COPZ RDWY IS ENRT W/ CABLE HOWEVER IF TOW IS UNABLE TO RECOVER VEH, WE WILL WAIT UNTIL A WATCH AND COORDINATE WITH THEM"
"[31] [Rotation Request Comment] *** Roadway Tow 760-747-3335 W/400-800 FT CABLE ***"
"[30] [Rotation Request Comment] Adams Tow SKIPPED / NEG LONG ENOUGH CABLE"
"[29] S/R TOW ADVS NEG CABLE LONG ENOUGH / SKIPPED"
"[28] S/R ADVS ONLY HAS 250 FT LONG CABLE / WILL ROLL NEXT ROT"
"[25] 92-28C 1185 - APPROX 400-800 FT DOWN THE EMBANKMENT"

"[12] 1039 NORCOMM VIA FIRE CC "
"[9] RP CALLED EARLIER ADV VEH WAS IN NEW MEXICO AND ALSO GAVE LAT/ LON 36.74644 -108.0837816 IN NEW MEXICO/ RP CB ADVS VEH IS IN CALIFORNIA AND REQ 1185 FOR VEH IN DITCH THAT IS NOT HIS"
"[8] STAM ADVS THEY DID SPEAK W/ RP WHO ADVS TO THEM HIS VEH WAS DOWN A DITCH - RP SOUNDED HEAVILY HBD - WAS SLURRING HIS WORDS"
"[4] RP ADVS VEH IS 3 MILES DOWN THE DITCH // RP SAW A CLOUD OF SMOKE AND WENT TO CHECK THE AREA"
"[3] RP ADVS TO STAM THAT ITS HIS VEH / NOW RP ADVS HE WAS RUNNING IN AREA AND CAME UPON 1124 VEH"
